# AUTO-GENERATED by `artheia gen-app-composition` — DO NOT EDIT
# composition: Demo3WayP1
# process:     P1
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(gen_Demo3WayP1_P1 C CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

if(NOT TARGET demo_runtime)
  add_subdirectory(../nodes demo_runtime_build)
endif()

add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME} main.cc)
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE demo_runtime)
